channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Faces Critical RBI Policy Decision Amid Iran War Pressure
item.description: The Reserve Bank of India meets this week as the Iran conflict drives up energy prices and complicates growth and inflation forecasts for Asia's third-largest economy.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Nvidia CEO Takes Center Stage at Computex Taipei
item.description: Jensen Huang opens the Computex trade show in Taiwan with a major speech on AI products and the island's central role in the semiconductor industry.

item.title: 💰 Gold Slips as Markets Await Trump Decision on Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Gold prices fell as a stronger dollar and rising oil prices pressured the metal, with investors waiting for Trump's decision on extending the Iran ceasefire.

item.title: 🛢️ China Crude Oil Imports Slump to Near 10-Year Low
item.description: China's seaborne crude imports fell to the lowest in almost a decade as the Iran war reshuffles operations for the world's biggest oil importer.

item.title: 🇪🇹 Ethiopia Holds Elections Expected to Deliver Abiy Landslide
item.description: Ethiopia holds parliamentary and regional elections that analysts expect Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's party to win by a landslide, despite significant unrest in much of the country.

item.title: 🌏 Indo-Pacific Nations Hedge Between Rising China and Distracted US
item.description: Countries in the Indo-Pacific region are deepening defense ties with multiple partners to avoid being caught between China's rapid military rise and an increasingly distracted United States.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Castigates Europe Over Defense Spending at NATO Asia Event
item.description: The United States fired a fresh broadside at its NATO allies over defense spending during a Singapore summit, while Western European officials insisted the alliance remains resilient.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Moves to Halt Nvidia AI Chip Shipments to Chinese Firms Abroad
item.description: New US guidance suggests advanced AI chips may have been reaching Chinese firms through foreign subsidiaries, prompting moves to close the loophole.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Explosion in Myanmar Village Kills at Least 55
item.description: A rebel army said a blast that killed at least 55 people in a Myanmar village was caused by the accidental explosion of material stored for use in mining.

item.title: 🇨🇿 Czech Republic Likely to Miss NATO Defense Spending Target
item.description: Prime Minister Andrej Babis said the Czech Republic will probably fall short of NATO's 2% GDP defense spending target this year.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Patrols Scarborough Shoal After Philippines Warning
item.description: China's military and coast guard carried out patrols near disputed waters in the South China Sea, a day after the Philippines warned of continued threat from Beijing.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Q1 Capex Stalls as Iran War Concerns Weigh on Confidence
item.description: Japanese business investment stalled in the first quarter as concerns about the Iran conflict weighed on corporate confidence.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Rejects Accusations of New Militarism
item.description: Japan pushed back against accusations of new militarism as regional tensions drive debate about its defense posture.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea and Japan Discuss Military Logistics Support Deal
item.description: South Korea and Japan are discussing a military logistics support agreement amid growing regional security concerns.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria's Sharaa Holds Phone Call With Trump
item.description: Syria's presidency announced a phone call between the new leader Ahmed al-Sharaa and US President Donald Trump.

item.title: 🇲🇩 Moldova's Orthodox Church Leader Steps Down
item.description: The patriarch of one of Moldova's two competing Orthodox churches stepped down amid tensions between pro-Russian and pro-Romanian factions.

item.title: ⚔️ Child Killed in Drone Attack on Russian-Held Kherson
item.description: A Russian-appointed official said a Ukrainian drone struck an apartment building in Russian-held Kherson, killing a child and injuring 11.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Businesses Remain Downbeat on Economy
item.description: British businesses remain pessimistic about economic prospects as the Iran conflict adds uncertainty to the global outlook.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskiy Seeks Progress on Peace Talks Before Winter
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said he wants to advance peace negotiations with Russia before winter, citing Ukraine's improved strategic position.

item.title: 💰 Dollar Steadies as Markets Await Iran War Signals
item.description: The US dollar held steady after a weekly loss as markets awaited results of Middle East peace talks and signals on central bank rate moves.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Shares Gain, Qatar Slips on Iran-US Deal Uncertainty
item.description: Saudi Arabia's bourse closed higher and Qatar's slipped as markets struggled to find direction amid uncertainty over a possible ceasefire extension.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Seizes 900-Year-Old Beaufort Castle in Lebanon
item.description: Israeli troops captured the strategic Beaufort Castle in a push against Hezbollah, marking Israel's deepest incursion into Lebanon in 26 years.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Makes Changes to Draft Ceasefire Agreement
item.description: Tehran is reportedly making changes to the latest draft of the ceasefire memorandum of understanding after Trump toughened the US stance.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Appoints Arrow-3 Innovator as National Security Adviser
item.description: Prime Minister Netanyahu appointed Shmuel Ben Ezra, an innovator of the Arrow-3 defense system, as his new national security adviser.
